message.content:
@startuml
left to right
participant "«boundary»\nZMDomačaStran" as ZMDomačaStran
participant "«control»\nKrmilnikNovica" as KrmilnikNovica
participant "«control»\nKrmilnikPredloga" as KrmilnikPredloga
participant "«control»\nKrmilnikDogodek" as KrmilnikDogodek
participant "«entity»\nPredlogProjekta" as PredlogProjekta
participant "«entity»\nNovica" as Novica
participant "«boundary»\nSVGGoogleCalendar API" as SVGGoogleCalendarAPI

ZMDomačaStran --> KrmilnikNovica
KrmilnikNovica --> KrmilnikPredloga
KrmilnikPredloga --> KrmilnikDogodek
KrmilnikDogodek --> SVGGoogleCalendarAPI
SVGGoogleCalendarAPI --> KrmilnikDogodek
KrmilnikDogodek --> PredlogProjekta
PredlogProjekta --> KrmilnikPredloga
KrmilnikPredloga --> Novica
Novica --> KrmilnikNovica
@enduml
